analyze: python3 -c 'from strategies.spot_strategies import CompositeScoringSystem; from database import get_klines; from config import SYMBOLS; s = CompositeScoringSystem(); [print(f"{sym}: {s.analyze(get_klines(sym, \"1d\", 100), sym)}") for sym in SYMBOLS]'
